name: Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions Inc.
summary: Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions Inc. (AITX), through its subsidiary Robotic Assistance Devices Inc. (RAD), delivers AI-powered security and facility management solutions combining intelligent hardware robots (ROAMEO, ROSA, AVA, TOM, RADDOG, HERO, RIO, RADCam, RAM) with software platforms including SARA Agentic AI and ROSS firearm detection. Solutions are offered primarily as recurring monthly subscriptions with minimum 12-month contracts, targeting commercial and public sector clients in the global security and facility management markets.
